name: Bridgewater Bancshares Inc
summary: Bridgewater Bancshares, Inc. is a Minnesota-based financial holding company operating through its subsidiary Bridgewater Bank. Founded in 2005 as a de novo bank, it focuses on commercial real estate lending, offering loans, deposits (transaction, savings, time, brokered), investment securities, letters of credit, and swap products. It serves businesses, entrepreneurs, and individuals in the Twin Cities MSA through nine full-service offices, with total assets of $5.41 billion as of December 31, 2025.
